meta.note: Default values used until the user changes them in Settings or the Calculator. All money values are USD and are ESTIMATES — verify current pricing with each provider.

timeline.label: FAFSA
timeline.description: File the FAFSA with WGU's school code so financial aid is ready when you enroll.

timeline.label: Sophia Courses
timeline.description: Complete every verified transferable Sophia course while the subscription clock runs.

timeline.label: Study.com Courses
timeline.description: Fill the gaps Sophia can't cover (geography, health) — verified equivalencies only.

timeline.label: Transcript Evaluation
timeline.description: Send Sophia + Study.com transcripts to WGU and confirm every course applied.

timeline.label: Enrollment
timeline.description: Complete WGU intake, financial aid finalization and degree plan review with an enrollment counselor.

timeline.label: Orientation
timeline.description: WGU orientation course and first program mentor call.

timeline.label: Term 1 (+ additional terms)
timeline.description: Accelerate through remaining courses — 12 CUs minimum per term, unlimited at flat rate.

timeline.label: Clinical Experience
timeline.description: Preclinical observation hours. Start background checks and placement paperwork EARLY.

timeline.label: Student Teaching I
timeline.description: First half of full-time supervised demonstration teaching, aligned to the host school calendar.

timeline.label: Student Teaching II
timeline.description: Second half of demonstration teaching plus the Teacher Performance Assessment.

timeline.label: Virginia Licensure
timeline.description: WGU institutional recommendation + Virginia DOE application, required tests and background check.

checklist.label: File FAFSA
checklist.hint: Add WGU's school code; renew each aid year.

checklist.label: Send transcripts to WGU
checklist.hint: Sophia + Study.com official transcripts; confirm receipt.

checklist.label: Enrollment complete
checklist.hint: Degree plan reviewed — confirm every transfer credit applied before term start.

checklist.label: Clinical experience cleared
checklist.hint: Background check, fingerprints, placement paperwork, observation hours.

checklist.label: Graduation conferred
checklist.hint: Final review complete — order official transcripts.

checklist.label: Virginia license issued
checklist.hint: Institutional recommendation + VDOE application + required tests.
